# Q8 join + comp (values + count distinct + if) (lateral movement rdp)

**Dataset**: `gx_06_rdp` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

RDP lateral-movement hunting — remote-desktop connection patterns across hosts. Q8 join + comp (values + count distinct + if). `count_distinct()` is the distinct-count (never `dcount`); `if(c, a, b)` classifies inline (nest for multi-branch; `case` does not exist).

```sql
dataset = gx_06_rdp | join type = inner (dataset = gx_06_hosts) as h h.host = dst_host | alter cj = if(tier = "crown-jewel", 1, 0) | comp count_distinct(dst_host) as hosts_reached, values(tier) as tiers_touched, sum(cj) as cj_sessions by user | fields user, hosts_reached, cj_sessions, tiers_touched | sort desc hosts_reached
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
